Docs.summary: The security settings of the machine.

MemberSignature.Value: public ContainerServiceMachineSecurityProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public bool? IsEncryptionAtHostEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsEncryptionAtHostEnabled
Public Property IsEncryptionAtHostEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsEncryptionAtHostEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Whether to enable host based OS and data drive encryption. This is only supported on certain VM sizes and in certain Azure regions. For more information, see: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/aks/enable-host-encryption.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsSecureBootEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsSecureBootEnabled
Public Property IsSecureBootEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsSecureBootEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Secure Boot is a feature of Trusted Launch which ensures that only signed operating systems and drivers can boot. For more details, see aka.ms/aks/trustedlaunch. If not specified, the default is false.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsVtpmEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsVtpmEnabled
Public Property IsVtpmEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsVtpmEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: vTPM is a Trusted Launch feature for configuring a dedicated secure vault for keys and measurements held locally on the node. For more details, see aka.ms/aks/trustedlaunch. If not specified, the default is false.
